GC=F_DX-Y.NYB.interpretation: Gold and DXY both rising simultaneously (normally inverse) — unusual dollar AND gold strength suggests flight to safety from something specific. Watch for geopolitical catalyst.

^TNX_^GSPC.interpretation: 10Y yield and S&P 500 moving together (normally inverse) — yields and stocks decoupling. High yields not currently hurting stock sentiment.

CL=F_^GSPC.interpretation: Oil and S&P 500 diverging (normally positive) — rising energy costs might be worrying equity markets, or demand concerns are decoupling them.

EURUSD=X_GC=F.interpretation: EUR/USD and Gold decoupling (normally positive) — gold moves decoupling from general currency dynamics, showing independent strength.

^TNX_DX-Y.NYB.interpretation: Yields and DXY decoupling (normally positive) — dollar weakening despite rising yields suggests capital flows favoring other currencies.

CL=F_USDINR=X.interpretation: Oil and INR decoupling (normally inverse) — rupee showing resilience despite rising oil import costs, indicating strong macro inflows.
